---
title: 'Turn Your Eyes Upon Jesus'
date: '2010-04-04T13:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7994424491466835626'
blogger_filename: '/2010/04/turn-your-eyes-upon-jesus.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<table border="0" bordercolor="#111111" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="926" id="AutoNumber1" style="border-collapse: collapse;"><tbody><tr><td height="30" valign="top" width="52%"><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: large;">Turn Your Eyes Upon Jesus<br /></span><hr /></td><td height="926" rowspan="2" valign="top" width="48%"><br />&nbsp;<img height="1" src="http://e2.extreme-dm.com/s11.g?login=hymnlold&amp;jv=y&amp;j=y&amp;srw=1600&amp;srb=24&amp;l=http%3A//www.hymnlyrics.org/newlyrics_all/t.php" width="1" /></td></tr><tr><td height="896" style="font-family: Arial;" valign="top" width="52%"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics"><div class="lyrics">O soul, are you weary and troubled?<br />No light in the darkness you see?<br />There’s a light for a look at the Savior,<br />And life more abundant and free!</div><div class="lyrics"><br /><div class="chorus"><i>Refrain</i></div><div class="chorus"><br /></div><div class="chorus"><i>Turn your eyes upon Jesus,<br />Look full in His wonderful face,<br />And the things of earth will grow strangely dim,<br />In the light of His glory and grace.</i></div><div class="chorus"><br /></div>Through death into life everlasting<br />He passed, and we follow Him there;<br />Over us sin no more hath dominion—<br />For more than conquerors we are!<br /><br /><div class="chorus"><i>Refrain</i></div><div class="chorus"><br /></div>His Word shall not fail you—He promised;<br />Believe Him, and all will be well:<br />Then go to a world that is dying,<br />His perfect salvation to tell!<br /><br /><div class="chorus"><i>Refrain</i></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
